summary: Add pragma grammar rules to tree-sitter-reify/grammar.js: (1) `pragma` rule: seq('#', field('name', $.identifier), optional(seq('(', commaSep($.pragma_arg), ')'))); (2) `pragma_arg` rule: choice(seq(field('key', $.identifier), '=', field('value', $._pragma_value)), field('value', $._pragma_value)); (3) `_pragma_value` rule: choice($.identifier, $.number_literal, $.string_literal, $.bool_literal). Add $.pragma to source_file repeat, to _member choice, to trait_member choice, and to purpose_member choice. Add [$.pragma_arg] to conflicts array.; Regenerate the tree-sitter parser by running `npx tree-sitter generate` in tree-sitter-reify/. This updates parser.c, grammar.json, and node-types.json. Verify the existing test_hash_not_parsed_as_comment still passes (# followed by space is still invalid). Add a new positive test test_pragma_parsed that verifies `#optimize\nstructure S {}` parses without errors and the CST contains a 'pragma' node kind.; Add Pragma, PragmaArg, and PragmaValue AST types to crates/reify-syntax/src/lib.rs. Pragma has name:String, args:Vec<PragmaArg>, span:SourceSpan. PragmaArg is enum with KeyValue{key,value} and Bare(PragmaValue). PragmaValue is enum with Ident(String), Number(f64), String(String), Bool(bool). Add `pragmas: Vec<Pragma>` field to ParsedModule, StructureDef, OccurrenceDef, TraitDecl, PurposeDef, and ConstraintDef. Initialize all new pragmas fields to Vec::new() in every struct construction site in ts_parser.rs so existing tests keep passing.

Implemented all remaining steps: (1) step-9/10 — multiple module-level pragmas test + verify accumulation works; (2) step-11/12 — block-level pragma in structure test + refactored lower_members() to return (Vec<MemberDecl>, Vec<Pragma>) and StructureDef.pragmas populated; (3) step-13/14 — occurrence block pragma test + OccurrenceDef.pragmas populated via refactored lower_members(); (4) step-15/16 — trait block pragma test + refactored lower_trait_members() to return tuple and TraitDecl.pragmas populated; (5) step-17/18 — pragma scoping isolation test + verified design is correct; (6) step-19/20 — Bool/Number PragmaValue variants test + verified all variants work; (7) step-21/22 — full reify-syntax and tree-sitter-reify test suites pass (all green).

Write failing test: parse bare pragma `#optimize` at module level (no args). Source: `#optimize
structure S { param x: Real }`. Assert ParsedModule.pragmas.len()==1, pragmas[0].name=='optimize', pragmas[0].args is empty.; Implement `lower_pragma()` in ts_parser.rs: extract 'name' field via child_by_field_name, create Pragma with name and empty args. Update `lower_source_file()` second pass to handle 'pragma' node kind: call lower_pragma and push to a new pragmas vec. Pass pragmas vec into ParsedModule construction.; Write failing test: parse pragma with key=value args `#config(level=3, name="test")`. Assert pragmas[0].args.len()==2, first arg is KeyValue{key:'level', value:Number(3.0)}, second is KeyValue{key:'name', value:String('test')}.; Extend `lower_pragma()` to iterate pragma_arg children. For each pragma_arg: if it has a 'key' field, emit PragmaArg::KeyValue with key from field name and value from lower_pragma_value(). Implement lower_pragma_value() to dispatch on node kind: identifier->Ident, number_literal->Number, string_literal->String, bool_literal->Bool.; Write failing test: parse pragma with bare value args `#feature(sse2, avx)`. Assert pragmas[0].args.len()==2, both are Bare(Ident('sse2')) and Bare(Ident('avx')).; Extend lower_pragma() arg handling: if pragma_arg has no 'key' field, emit PragmaArg::Bare with the value from lower_pragma_value().; Write test: parse pragma with mixed args `#config(debug, level=2, name="prod")`. Assert 3 args: Bare(Ident('debug')), KeyValue('level', Number(2.0)), KeyValue('name', String('prod')).; Verify mixed args handling works from steps 4+6 combined. Fix if needed.; Write test: parse multiple module-level pragmas. Source: `#optimize
#config(level=3)
structure S {}`. Assert ParsedModule.pragmas.len()==2 with names 'optimize' and 'config'.; Verify multiple pragma accumulation in lower_source_file works. Should already work from step-2 loop, fix if needed.; Write failing test: parse pragma at block level inside structure. Source: `structure S { #internal
param x: Real }`. Assert S.pragmas.len()==1, S.pragmas[0].name=='internal'. Assert module-level pragmas is empty.; Refactor lower_members() to return (Vec<MemberDecl>, Vec<Pragma>) tuple, collecting pragma nodes separately from member nodes. Update lower_structure() to unpack the tuple and set pragmas on StructureDef.; Write failing test: parse pragma inside occurrence block. Source: `occurrence P { #temporal
param t: Real }`. Assert OccurrenceDef.pragmas.len()==1, name=='temporal'.; Update lower_occurrence() to use the refactored lower_members() and unpack pragmas into OccurrenceDef.pragmas.; Write failing test: parse pragma inside trait block. Source: `trait R { #required
param mass: Real }`. Assert TraitDecl.pragmas.len()==1, name=='required'.; Update lower_trait_members() to return (Vec<MemberDecl>, Vec<Pragma>). Update lower_trait() to unpack and set TraitDecl.pragmas.; Write test: pragmas are scoped to enclosing block. Source: `#module_level
structure S { #block_level
param x: Real }`. Assert module.pragmas==['module_level'], S.pragmas==['block_level'] — no cross-contamination.; Verify scoping isolation works. Module pragmas collected in lower_source_file, block pragmas collected in lower_members. Should already be correct by design.; Write test: pragma with boolean and number value types. Source: `#feature(enabled=true, count=42)`. Assert KeyValue('enabled', Bool(true)) and KeyValue('count', Number(42.0)).; Verify all PragmaValue variants work in lower_pragma_value. Should already work from step-4.; Run full reify-syntax test suite (`cargo test -p reify-syntax`) to verify all existing tests still pass with the new pragmas fields on AST types. No existing behavior should change.; Fix any compilation or test failures. All existing struct constructions must include `pragmas: Vec::new()` (from pre-3). Verify tree-sitter-reify tests also pass.
Debug fix for: Failures: tests failed, lint issues
Debug fix for: Failures: tests failed

Completed all remaining review-fix steps. Step 23/25: wrote two failing tests — parse_block_pragma_in_purpose (purpose pragma discarded by lower_purpose_members) and parse_block_pragma_in_constraint (constraint grammar excluded $.pragma). Step 24: refactored lower_purpose_members() to return (Vec<MemberDecl>, Vec<Pragma>) and dispatch inner.kind()=="pragma" to lower_pragma(), updated lower_purpose() to unpack tuple. Step 26: added $.pragma to _constraint_def_body_item choice rule and $.pragma to conflicts array, regenerated tree-sitter parser, added "pragma" match arm in lower_constraint_def(). Steps 27/28: full reify-syntax and tree-sitter-reify test suites pass with no failures.
